meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Stop Building Basic Apps
content.seo_description: Stop delivering basic apps. Learn to implement high-conversion user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to impress clients and scale your freelance dev.
content.answer_block: Stop building static CRUD interfaces. To graduate from basic apps, implement event-driven user onboarding that guides clients through value realization. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code for automated implementation, you transform generic interfaces into high-conversion workflows that prove ROI, increase retention, and justify premium freelance rates.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: the deadline is looming, the client wants 'something more,' and you’re staring at a functional but soulless dashboard. It’s the 'basic app trap'—where your code works, but the user experience feels like a ghost town. You aren't just a coder; you're a product architect, and it's time your builds started reflecting that.

True mastery isn't about more features; it's about the first sixty seconds of interaction. By integrating intelligent onboarding, you bridge the gap between 'functional' and 'indispensable.' This guide is your blueprint to weaponizing your dev workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to build sophisticated, onboarding-centric applications that command top-tier market rates.

steps.title: Architecting the Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Define the critical path from signup to the 'Aha!' moment. Use Antigravity to map out the state machine for the onboarding journey.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a state machine schema for a SaaS onboarding flow. Include states for: welcome, profile_setup, feature_tour, and dashboard_initialization. Ensure each state has a transition trigger based on user completion status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude create-schema --file onboarding_flow.json --from-prompt 'Antigravity state machine output'

steps.title: Implementing Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Don't overwhelm users. Use Claude Code to inject lightweight, non-blocking tooltips that highlight value propositions during the first login.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React component for a contextual tooltip. It must accept a target element ID, a header, and a body. Style it to be unobtrusive and include a 'Skip' button.

steps.title: Data-Driven Progress Tracking
steps.description: Create a progress bar that motivates users. This keeps them engaged by visualizing how close they are to a fully configured account.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a TypeScript hook that tracks completion percentage across multiple steps. It should interface with a backend user-profile API to persist state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude generate-hook --name useOnboardingProgress --logic 'Antigravity completion tracker logic'

steps.title: Automating User State Persistence
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding state survives browser refreshes. Use Claude Code to wire up the backend API endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Node.js/Express controller for updating user_onboarding_status. Include validation for step completion and error handling.

steps.title: Final Integration and QA
steps.description: Run an automated test suite to ensure the onboarding flow doesn't break existing app functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Playwright end-to-end test script that simulates a new user going through the onboarding flow, checking for progress bar updates.

pro_tips: Never force onboarding; always provide a clear 'Skip' path to respect the user's intelligence.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure'—only show complex features after the user has completed the basic onboarding setup.
Trigger onboarding resets based on long-term inactivity to re-engage churned users.
Inject the user's name dynamically into tooltips using a provider pattern to personalize the experience.
Analyze the drop-off rate per onboarding step using custom telemetry to identify friction points in your UI.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a 5-user usability test, and refine your tooltips based on the friction points observed.
content.conversion_block: Stop delivering basic apps that fail to convert. Leverage these advanced onboarding techniques to turn your code into a professional-grade product that clients love. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
